news.t: First Trust Expands Its Target Outcome Laddered Fund Suite with Three New Strategies

overview.description: The FT Vest Laddered Emerging Markets Buffer ETF (BUFE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund provides emerging market exposure through a laddered portfolio of four ETFs. Each underlying fund uses options to match the price return of EEM ETF up to a predetermined upside cap while providing a buffer against losses. BUFE was launched on Apr 8, 2026 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Expands Its Target Outcome Laddered Fund Suite with Three New Strategies
